underlying_goal: Build a personal AI-powered work system based on a Chinese article's framework, including directory structure, personal positioning, memory context, and cross-project configuration
friction_detail: Claude asked multiple rounds of clarifying questions when filling positioning.md, requiring user to type answers manually after selecting options that said 'I'll explain'.
brief_summary: User wanted to build a personal knowledge management and AI work system from an article template, fill in personal details from resume/PPT files, and enable cross-project sharing — all tasks were completed successfully across multiple files.
